title: Amtech G0964 Glass and Tile Scraper
features: VERSATILE: This glass and tile scraper has a 100mm (4") wide blade and is ideal for removing paint and stickers from glass, tiles and other shiny surfaces
EASY TO USE: Supplied with 6 blades which are stored inside the handle, it has a quick blade change facility for ease of use
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 inch / 100 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains Glass and Tile Scrapper See more
